error_signature: out of memory or times out during processing
title: Memory issue when processing large CSV files
symptom: When processing large CSV files with 10,000 rows, n8n runs out of memory or times out.
applies_when: Using Google Drive as a source
root_cause: Processing large files in a single operation can exceed the memory limits of the n8n instance, leading to timeouts or crashes. This is especially common when handling large datasets without breaking them into smaller chunks.
fix_steps: Add a SplitInBatches node before processing the CSV data
Set the batch size to between 500 and 1000 items
Connect the output of the SplitInBatches node to the processing node
agent_instruction: Implement chunked processing by using the SplitInBatches node with a batch size of 500 to 1000.
